summary.text: Maps the endpoint port for the
to the appropriate command line argument.

endpointName.text: The name of the endpoint to map. If not specified, it will use the first HTTP or HTTPS endpoint found.

members.name: WithNpm
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<NxResource> JavaScriptHostingExtensions.WithNpm(this IResourceBuilder<NxResource> builder, bool install = false, Action<IResourceBuilder<JavaScriptInstallerResource>>? configureInstaller = null)

summary.text: Configures the Nx workspace to use npm as the package manager and optionally installs packages before apps start.

configureInstaller.text: A function to configure the installer resource builder.

install.text: When true, automatically installs packages before apps start. When false (default), only sets the package manager annotation without creating an installer resource.

members.name: WithNpm
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<TurborepoResource> JavaScriptHostingExtensions.WithNpm(this IResourceBuilder<TurborepoResource> builder, bool install = false, Action<IResourceBuilder<JavaScriptInstallerResource>>? configureInstaller = null)

summary.text: Configures the Turborepo workspace to use npm as the package manager and optionally installs packages before apps start.

configureInstaller.text: A function to configure the installer resource builder.

install.text: When true, automatically installs packages before apps start. When false (default), only sets the package manager annotation without creating an installer resource.

members.name: WithPackageManagerLaunch
members.signature: public static IResourceBuilder<NxResource> JavaScriptHostingExtensions.WithPackageManagerLaunch(this IResourceBuilder<NxResource> builder, string? packageManager = null)

summary.text: Configures the Nx workspace to use the specified JavaScript package manager when starting apps.

packageManager.text: The package manager to use. If none is provided it will attempt to use the installer annotation's resource command.

description.text: Thrown if the Nx workspace is already configured to use a different package manager.
